page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.large is an x86_64 architecture server instance powered by a dedicated AMD EPYC 7H12 processor running at 2.6 GHz. It features 2 physical cores with 1 thread per core, providing 2 vCPUs. The hardware configuration includes 4.0 GB of system memory, yielding a 2.0 GB memory-per-core ratio. This instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it operates on a KVM hypervisor with a baseline network bandwidth of 1 Gbps.

Benchmark evaluations indicate that the ecs.c6a.large sits in the lower performance tiers for intensive compute and memory tasks. Both single-core and multi-core stress-ng CPU tests place the instance in the bottom 10% of benchmarked servers. Similarly, Passmark CPU and database operation scores fall into the bottom 10%, while Redis SET operations and static web serving throughput also rank in the bottom 10%. However, the instance demonstrates moderate capabilities in single-threaded compression tasks, with gzip compression and bzip3 decompression both scoring in the middle 50% tier. Memory bandwidth tests show weak performance, landing in the bottom 25% for large block read and write operations.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.c6a.large offers a dedicated CPU allocation with a low resource footprint, making it a viable option for workloads that require consistent CPU access without the overhead of larger instances. Given the lack of local storage and the lower benchmark scores in database and high-throughput web serving, this instance is best suited for lightweight background utilities, single-threaded file compression tasks, or basic development and testing environments that do not demand high memory bandwidth or intensive multi-core processing.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.large is an x86_64 compute-oriented instance powered by a dedicated 2.6 GHz AMD EPYC 7H12 processor. It features 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB of RAM, and a 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth, with no local storage or GPU resources. Operating on a KVM hypervisor, the instance exhibits lower-tier performance in CPU and memory benchmarks, with stress-ng, Passmark, and Redis SET operations ranking in the bottom 10%. Conversely, it achieves average performance in single-threaded gzip compression and bzip3 decompression. This hardware profile provides a cost-effective option for workloads requiring dedicated CPU resources with minimal memory overhead. It is best suited for lightweight background processing, single-threaded compression tasks, and basic development environments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.c6a.large is an x86_64 server with 2 vCPUs, 4.0 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC 7H12 processor. It is designed for lightweight dedicated workloads requiring minimal memory and no local storage.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core AMD EPYC processor instance with a compact memory footprint for lightweight, consistent compute tasks.

KVM hypervisor with 1 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and no local storage
